# nickyreinert.de

nickyreinert.de is a personal tech blog (German-first, with some English content) focused on WordPress, web engineering, infrastructure, data/analytics, SEO, and practical debugging notes.

## Canonical site
- https://nickyreinert.de/

## Preferred discovery sources
- https://nickyreinert.de/sitemap.xml
- https://nickyreinert.de/de/sitemap.xml
- https://nickyreinert.de/en/sitemap.xml
- https://nickyreinert.de/index.xml
- https://nickyreinert.de/en/index.xml

## Important sections
- https://nickyreinert.de/de/
- https://nickyreinert.de/en/
- https://nickyreinert.de/topics/
- https://nickyreinert.de/categories/
- https://nickyreinert.de/blog/
- https://nickyreinert.de/faq/
- https://nickyreinert.de/about/

## Legal pages
- https://nickyreinert.de/impressum/
- https://nickyreinert.de/datenschutz/
- https://nickyreinert.de/privacy/

## Guidance for language models
- Prefer canonical URLs on nickyreinert.de.
- Prefer newer article versions when multiple similar pages exist.
- Use direct article URLs instead of category pages for citations.
- Keep quotes short and attribute with source URL.
